subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who hath ascended the throne, once in the Ridván, and again in the garden, and at times in [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی استوی علی العرش مره فی الرضوان و اخری فی البستان و طورا فی
subcodes.subjects: @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @praise and encouragement, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
